title: DN21 5XB, Mr Simon Elwess and Mrs Victoria Elwess: environmental permit issued - EPR/CP3321SF/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Simon Elwess and Mrs Victoria Elwess   Installation name: Manor Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/CP3321SF/A001   "
